parsed_output.justification: Jordan2's claims are logically impossible for a Robber; he claims to have swapped cards with Haak (Line 53) and later claims to have looked at Meryl's card to see she was the Seer (Line 147), but a Robber only swaps once and looks at their new card. Haak and Jordan2 are corroborating each other's stories, which is a common tactic for Team Werewolf to divert suspicion. Furthermore, Meryl's claim as Seer that the Troublemaker card was in the center contradicts Haak's claim to be the Troublemaker, suggesting Haak is lying to hide his identity as a Werewolf.
